name: Soul Stain
description:
You have a chance based of the §6premitigation §rdamage you deal to apply the Sculkified debuff.
 Your chance to inflict Sculkified turns to 50% if youre inside a 5 block vicinity of Sculk.

 Enemies which are sculkified don't turn invisible anymore due to Sculked Sight.

 Each stack decreases the debuffed player's damage against you by 7% 

 At 5 Stacks the debuffed get Mining fatique and Slowness. 

 At 10 Stacks deal 33% additional true damage and, crippling their health regen. 

 A Stack decreases every 30 seconds without being in combat with you. 

 If the debuffed is in a 5 block range of Soul related items the debuff ticks down twice as fast and, the health regen debuff doesn't apply anymore. 

 per stack of Sculkified applied grow your size by 0.025 blocks. 

Your chance to inflict someone with Sculkified doubles if you have inflicted 5 levels of Sculkified concurrently.

 Sculkified Stacks up to 10 Times onto a target. 

 Killing a Sculkified Entity Sculkifies the area around them depending on the level. 

 Sculkified is unaffected by stupor.
